description_long: This house is a luxurious, sprawling residence with a grand, symmetrical layout and a prominent central driveway leading up to the main entrance. The front features a circular driveway, flanked by manicured lawns and rows of tall palm trees, creating a stately approach. The house itself has a white exterior with rounded, turret-like extensions on either side, and a flat roof with multiple terraces and outdoor seating areas. Large windows and glass doors are visible, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding landscape. Behind the house, there is an expansive backyard with two rectangular swimming pools, a circular hot tub, and additional palm trees, all set within a neatly landscaped garden. The overall design exudes a modern Mediterranean or resort-like aesthetic, emphasizing open spaces, outdoor living, and luxury.
description: A grand, white luxury house with rounded extensions, flat roof terraces, and a landscaped approach lined with palm trees. The backyard features two pools, a hot tub, and lush green lawns.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the main entrance, circular driveway, and symmetrical palm-lined approach, with the house's rounded extensions and terraces visible.
description_view_1: The left-side view shows the house's curved architecture, outdoor terraces, and the full expanse of the backyard with pools and palm trees.
description_view_2: The rear view focuses on the backyard, displaying two large pools, a circular hot tub, and the symmetrical arrangement of palm trees and lawns.
description_view_3: The right-side view reveals the house's rounded extensions, terrace details, and the landscaped backyard with pools and palm trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Grand central entry with double doors, circular driveway, and flanking columns, approached via a wide, palm-lined path
